desc: Remove a user as an app collaborator

app_id.desc: The ID of the app the user is a collaborator on.

user_id.desc: The ID of the user to remove as a collaborator.

user_email.desc: The email of the user to remove as a collaborator.  This email has to be associated with a slack user in the workspace.

warnings.desc: Non-blocking warnings from app manifest validation.

app_not_found.desc: The given app cannot be found.

app_not_owned_by_manager_app.desc: The specified app is not managed by the calling manager app.

user_not_found.desc: The given user cannot be found.

cannot_remove_owner.desc: Unable to remove the given user.

cannot_abandon_app.desc: The last collaborator cannot be removed

cannot_remove_collaborators.desc: User is unable to remove collaborators
